title: Cormigonus fritillariodes

The Iridaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the iris family. Cormigonus fritillariodes is further classified as a member of the subfamily Iridoideae. It is native to South Africa and is part of the Southern Hemisphere flora. As a member of the Iridaceae family, Cormigonus fritillariodes is also known as a monocot, a group of flowering plants with one cotyledon in their seeds.
